5.ua,antidiary.com,chudesa.site,gazeta.ua,guru.ua,hd-dream.ru,kino-dom.org,lugradar.net,oklivetv.com,pure-t.ru,rian.com.ua,webcam.guru.ua,yahooeu.ru#%#(function(){var b=XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open,c=/[/.@](piguiqproxy\.com|rcdn\.pro|amgload\.net|dsn-fishki\.ru|v6t39t\.ru|greencuttlefish\.com|rgy1wk\.ru|vt4dlx\.ru|d38dub\.ru)[:/]/i;XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open=function(d,a){if("GET"===d&&c.test(a))this.send=function(){return null},this.setRequestHeader=function(){return null},console.log("AG has blocked request: ",a);else return b.apply(this,arguments)}})();

game8.vn,shippuden-naruto.com#%#(function(){var b=XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open,c=/[/.@](piguiqproxy\.com|rcdn\.pro|amgload\.net|dsn-fishki\.ru|v6t39t\.ru|greencuttlefish\.com|rgy1wk\.ru|vt4dlx\.ru|d38dub\.ru|csp-oz66pp\.ru|ok9ydq\.ru|kingoablc\.com)[:/]/i;XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open=function(d,a){if("GET"===d&&c.test(a))this.send=function(){return null},this.setRequestHeader=function(){return null},console.log("AG has blocked request: ",a);else return b.apply(this,arguments)}})();
